approach: The challenge requires interacting with two endpoints: POST /api/aurora/open and PUT /api/aurora/close. Based on the evidence, the workflow involves calling /open to obtain a runId and a signal (from the channels array), then passing these values to /close. I will perform a POST request to /open, extract the runId and the signal from the 24th channel (index 23), and then perform a PUT request to /close with these values.
uncertainties: The exact index of the channel to use for the signal was inferred from the relation mapping, assuming index 23 is the correct one.
